verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When the world and it's turmoil surround me And the cares of this life are all I see Remind me dear Lord of where I should be Keep me close to the foot of Calvary

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Keep me close to the foot of Cross I surrender my will whatever the cost Draw me close let me see where you suffer and bled for me Keep me close to the foot of the Cross

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: All around me are those who have lost The love for the Savior His cause Help me dear Lord to reachin' for thee Lead them back to the foot of Calvary

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Your love lead the way with the word "Get across" On a hill you died for my sin Your suffer being man paid the debt for all man How great is Your love for me

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Before You one day I will stand And I will answer for the life that I have live So lead me Dear Lord and let me follow thee Keep me close to the foot of Calvary Keep me close to the foot of Calvary
